zh.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik是Lars和Elin Håkansdotter的兒子，出生。他和Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1442年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik是Lars和Elin Håkansdotter的儿子，出生。他和Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1442年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Sparre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Gerson.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a frugal person, from Germansparen ‘to save, to economize’ + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Sigge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bigg
meanings: English: from Middle English bigge ‘large, strong, stout’, presumably a descriptive nickname for a large, strong person.
English: topographic name from Middle English big ‘building’, a derivative of Middle English biggen (Old Norse byggja) ‘to build’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of German   Bick   or of some other similar (like-sounding) name from continental Europe (compare   Big   2).

nameMeanings.name: Larsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lars, Erik, Anders, Fredrik, Nels, Nils, Olle, Per, Sten, Algot, Birgit, Bjorn.  German Bernhard, Hans, Markus, Oskar.
Swedish: patronymic from the personal name Lars, an equivalent of Lawrence . Compare Larson 1, Larrison , and Lawson 2.
Americanized form of Norwegian and rare North German or Danish patronymic Larssen, a cognate of 1 above. Compare Larsen and Larson 1.

variants.name: Lawrence
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Laurence .  This is the usual spelling of the surname, and is now becoming increasingly common as a given name, especially in North America.

variants.name: Larson
meanings: Mainly North American: transferred use of the mainly Scottish surname, which is of uncertain derivation. The first known bearer of the surname is a certain Robert de Carsan (or de Acarson), recorded in 1276 ; the ‘de’ suggests derivation from a place name, but no suitable place has been identified. Among Protestants in Northern Ireland, it is sometimes bestowed in honour of Edward Carson ( 1854–1935 ), the Dublin barrister and politician who was a violent opponent of Home Rule for Ireland. In America the popularity of the name may have been affected by the legendary Missouri frontiersman Kit Carson ( 1809–68 ).

en.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik was born as the son of Lars and Elin Håkansdotter. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. He died before 1442.

fr.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik est né, fils de Lars et Elin Håkansdotter. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. Il est décédé avant 1442.

de.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik wurde, als Sohn von Lars und Elin Håkansdotter geboren. Er hatte mit Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 1442.

it.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik è nato il come figlio di Lars e Elin Håkansdotter. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. Morì prima del 1442.

ja.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af RossvikはLarsとElin Håkansdotterの息子として生まれた。彼はMargareta Bengtsdotter Färlaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1442年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik(은)는 Lars(와)과 Elin Håkansdotter의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1442년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik nasceu filho de Lars e Elin Håkansdotter. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. Ele faleceu antes 1442.

ru.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik родился. Его родителей звали Lars и Elin Håkansdotter. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. Он умер перед 1442 г.

es.lifeSummary: Sigge Larsson Sparre af Rossvik nació como hijo de Lars y Elin Håkansdotter. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Margareta Bengtsdotter Färla. Murió antes de 1442.

th.–Female: ถึงแก่กรรม
